New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records, 1911-1981.

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records, 1911-1981.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
23-11-2679
Creator:
New York State College of Human Ecology. Office of Student Services
Quanitities:
50 cubic feet.
Restrictions on Access

Only records of deceased alumni are open for research.
Scope and content

Lists of students by class year.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Preferred Citation

New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records, #23-11-2679. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
